Library: Window callouts were updated for the Kitchen Plan.
Add windows and door layers to RCP plan.

Turned on cross section cameras in working framing view.
The roof vent calcs were hardcoded. The all options macro has now been updated to drive those values.

Added a new Circuit Breaker Panel Creator System which includes toolbars linked to library objects. The system takes a note which automatically detects the room it is in. if you attached the note to an appliance or a cabinet with an appliance in it then it should automatically parse the name of the appliance into the panel creator. This generates an electrical panel schedule which is included in the ProArch + NCS Layouts. The existing garbage disposal/dishwasher/hood vent outlets also report to the panel schedule.

This layout uses National CAD Standards for sheet enumeration and adds additional views such as Mechanical/Plumbing/RCP/Landscape as well as additional spec, Project Team and reorders the sheets according to the NCS standard. It is expected that more serious Architectural Design Submittals Be Done in This Set.

Library: Updated the pro plan transfer tool to include labels. Updated the selection schedules for updating windows/doors/walls.
Added new layers for display layers to drive the look of new wall types vs existing wall types.
Fixed a glitch with the default exterior wall type not following layers.
Fixed some of the Pro Plan Library Walls to follow PP layer settings.
Added an Ultrawide toolbar layout.
Broke up the kitchen tools for laptop screen compatibility.

Added an RCP saved plan view with text/notes layers and new keynote schedule. Converted all ceiling mounted lights in the library to the new custom electrical, RCP layer that is displayed in that saved plan view.
Added a new stem wall width designation and added the associated text library object in the pro plan tools library.

Every single detail in the Pro Plan has each component polyline mapped to neq unique layers which drive the fill styles. You can now globally change all fill styles colors and patterns for the entire detail system to match your standard.
Fixed room label and now properly abbreviates its name based on all options.
Changed Room fill style layer color to light grey.
Built new library of fill styles for graphic real estate listing style overview.
Anno tool options now live in the built-in Project Information Tool.
Only schedule numbers are displayed in elevations for cabinets and fenestration.
Walls, roofs, hatching tool fill style driven by SPV’s/Layer Sets.
Room label abbreviates rooms less than 12 sq. ft and hides height label.
Framing fill styles are view dependent. Adjusted colors and fills for better graphics.
Removed Redlines, small details, and working landscaping SPV’s and added in default sets drop down menu to use small details or redlines.
Footing follows fill style, set to angle hatch and follows layer color at 80% transparency.
Turned on the ceiling beam and joist layer for the floor, framing plan SPV.
Adjusted all framing fill styles for better framing views.

Walls were rebuilt to get their main layer line parameters from a new layer called Walls, Main Layer Lines. This gives the ability to quickly either show the framing lines in wall types or keep them hidden and make it view dependent.
With new wall type layer management, made new default sets for new construction which changes the dimension default and displays the main wall layer and hatches other wall layers.
Details now have some layer-based fill styles.
Rewrote the room label. Added the new style palette tool for proposed rooms.
Added the new style palette tool for additions. Will add to new conditioned area.
Added new side panel kitchen quick tools.
Added new tray divider quick tool.
New Pro Plan Transfer Tool reduces steps.
Cleaned up floor framing plan for better display.
Rewrote the door macro for proper offset of RO labels in framing views.
BWP tool changed draw order for better display in framing views.
MAJOR overhaul of all macro driven systems have led to a decrease in drawing lag of approximately 350ms per click for drawing rooms and placing windows/doors/cabinets are as follows:

Window/Door/Cabinet label systems have all been turned into global methods and have been re-written to call other global methods. This reduces the time it takes for each window/door/cabinet to pass through their logical arguments.
Global helper macros were created to remove bottlenecks.
The roof and foundation NFA and the Area Analysis systems were all combined into single macros to reduce redundant calls.
Anno tool has been completely re-written for more easily customizable annotations and now automatically reports floor surface when not connected but inside of a room.
Most macro systems are now global lambdas with a reporting output so you can see the output but the call is done through a global which allows objects to retrieve values concurrently.
Removed lesser used or obscure macros for easier management in the TMM console.
Changed order of calls and dependencies to avoid macro checks that were unnecessary.

Rewrote the room and ceiling height macros again and now they automatically format themselves based on the room sizes. The truncate tool now will revert that formatting in the case that you want a full size label to place outside of a small room.
All objects now work by looking at a global label system to start parsing their individual values instead of one-by-one iterating through a macro in the TMM thus waiting its turn for the next.
Overhauled the Detail Designations Page. Added new categories for deck structural elements and others.
Removed the cadlabel fill-based designation system, rewrote details to remove this system.
Built a library of annotations for integrating into the system.
Redesigned the detail designations page to simplify it. The detail preview has now been removed.
- Added fallback values and safe property access for doors in non-standard spaces.
- Note: This corrects an error introduced by previous AI-based coding that hardcoded door logic instead of using the configurable all options system.
- Added enhanced label_Rab macro with comprehensive error handling and superscript fallbacks.
- Added label_Super helper macro for dimension formatting with superscript support.
- Implemented rescue wrappers for doors, windows, and cabinets with evaluation errors.
- Cabinet fallback format: schedule_number + type[0] + width + height.
- Door/Window fallback format: schedule_number + superscript dimensions in typical label fashion.
- Restored proper functionality of user options for door labels.
- Applied same space character handling to cabinet label replacement fields.
Plumbing Keynotes CAD Detail Restoration.
- Added back plumbing keynotes CAD detail to the system.
- Restored plumbing annotation capabilities for detailed plumbing documentation.
Right click on a blank area of your toolbars and choose “Customize Toolbars”.
Search for Place Library Object.
Drage the Place Library Object onto your walls toolbar.
Link the Library Object to the BWP Tool(Cabinet) in your Library.
- Updated csv_auto_print_custom_font macro in layout files to automatically detect and process climate zone patterns.
- Climate zone macros are automatically resolved before applying small font remapping.
- Repaired Willow layouts by removing fill style from sheet size text.
Interior Door Schedule.
- Added comprehensive interior door schedule functionality.
- Integrated door schedule with layout system for floor plan views.
- Applied door schedule across all Architectural and ANSI D layouts.
- Enhanced layout organization and door information display.
Toolbars: Right click on a blank area of your toolbars and choose “Customize Toolbars”.
Drage the Place Library Object onto your walls toolbar.
Specify the Icon provided in the step 5 folder.
Plan Template: Updated.
- Error was occurring specifically in attic/unfinished spaces on 2nd floor.
Enhanced Label System with Error Handling.
- Added label_Super helper macro for dimension formatting with superscript support.
- Cabinet fallback format: schedule_number + type[0] + width + height.
- Door/Window fallback format: schedule_number + superscript dimensions in typical label fashion.
- All fallbacks maintain proper superscript formatting for dimensions.
Label Replacement and User Options Enhancements.
- Fixed label replacement field to accept single space character as valid input.
- Single space character now properly clears both type and hinge side labels.
- Hinge side display now correctly respects user option settings.
- Example: Entering " " (single space) in Label Replacement will show only dimensions without type or handiness.
- Example label output: "2668" instead of "2668 RH" when space is used.
- Maintains existing plumbing keynote functionality and formatting.
Wall Legend Restoration (Performance Optimized)
- Added back wall legend functionality to the system.
- **Important Note:** Wall legend is currently set to NOT include walls by default.
- This prevents live updating and wall legend population during normal plan work.
- **Action Required Before Printing:** Open the wall legend and check "Include Walls" option to populate the legend.
- Performance optimization prevents potential slowdowns during plan development.
- Wall legend will only update when manually enabled for final documentation.
Version 25.08.18.
Recessed Light Fixture Fix.
- Fixed issue with recessed light fixture cutting a hole in the floor above.
- Resolved improper floor penetration behavior.
Disclaimer System Fix (Spec Files)
- Fixed issue with disclaimer not properly picking up the designer name.
- Improved designer name recognition and display in disclaimer text.
- System now supports %climate_zone%, %climate_zoneCA%, %climate_zoneMI%, and %climate_zoneWA% patterns in CSV values.
- Maintains existing small font functionality while adding climate zone support.
Version 25.08.11.
Plan Changes.
- Modified furniture SPV display to not show ceiling height for cleaner real estate presentation.
- Added display of room dimensions to show fixtures and appliances in furniture SPVs.
- Hidden callouts in furniture SPVs for more of a real estate type view.
Installation & Distribution.
- Added DMG Mac installer program to help install the Pro Plan on macOS systems.
- Simplified installation process for Mac users.
Project CSV System Improvements.
- Enhanced error response handling for cases where the system cannot read the root project_directory.rb file.
- Updated root directory configuration to use %q syntax for better accuracy and easier user configuration.
- Improved error messages and troubleshooting guidance for configuration issues.

- Applied door schedule across all Architectural and ANSI D layouts.

- Applied door schedule across all Architectural and ANSI D layouts.
- Enhanced layout organization and door information display.
